vocab.meaning: giao dịch mượt mà, không gián đoạn
vocab.example: I gravitate towards online banking because it facilitates seamless transactions without the need to carry physical bills.
With the rapid advancement of technology, we are quickly transitioning into a cashless society where digital wallets are the norm.
Contactless payment methods have become my go-to choice due to their unparalleled speed and convenience at checkout counters.

vocab.meaning: sự minh bạch về tài chính
vocab.example: Digital banking provides better financial transparency as every single cent spent is automatically logged in the transaction history.
Using bank cards makes it significantly easier to track my spending patterns through monthly electronic statements.

vocab.meaning: vi phạm bảo mật, lỗ hổng an ninh
vocab.example: Despite the convenience of apps, some people still stick to cash because they are wary of a potential security breach or identity theft.

vocab.meaning: những tình huống không lường trước được
vocab.example: I always keep a small amount of hard cash on me just in case of unforeseen circumstances like a system outage or a dead phone battery.

vocab.meaning: cửa hàng truyền thống (cửa hàng vật lý)
vocab.example: While most brick-and-mortar stores now accept cards, some small local vendors still operate on a cash-only basis.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy kỷ luật tài chính
vocab.example: Paying with cash can help foster financial discipline because the physical act of handing over money makes you more aware of your budget.

vocab.word: at the touch of a button
vocab.meaning: chỉ bằng một nút bấm (rất nhanh chóng và dễ dàng)
vocab.example: The ability to transfer large sums of money at the touch of a button is why I find online banking indispensable.
